page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool for visualizing array CGH data and/or expression arrays onto chromosomal coordinates to allow for correlations between copy number and gene expression to be observed. It is included in the GEPAS package.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool for visualizing array CGH data and/or expression arrays onto chromosomal coordinates to allow for correlations between copy number and gene expression to be observed. It is included in the GEPAS package.
